free_text: Excitation functions for radionuclides produced
in Zr-target at E(p)=660 MeV
Two Zr-targets, thickness 0.0622 and 0.0644 g/cm2,
d=30 mm, were used.
Decay-Data.
Activation time was 15 min.
The Error in the calibration of spectrometer.
No information about source of uncertainty
DATA-ERR does not include decay data and monitor cross
section uncertainties.
Tbl. on p.488 from 91MINSK,,488
Flag is added to DATA-section. REL-REF was
corrected. Common Section was corrected too.
Elem/Mass Formalism has been changed to
usual Reaction one.
Last checking has been done.
